dashboard.label: Webex Alert Action - Overview
dashboard.description: Overview and documentation for the Webex Alert Action

div.p: Send alert notifications from Splunk to Webex Teams rooms

ol.li: Get Bot Token: Create a bot at developer.webex.com
Add Bot to Room: In Webex Teams, add your bot to the desired room/space
Configure Alert: Create an alert and add "Send Webex Message" action
Enter Details: Bot token, room name (or ID), and message
Test: Trigger the alert to verify it works

ul.li: Use room names instead of Room IDs
Plain text and Markdown message support

pre.style: background: #0078D4; padding: 10px; border-radius: 10px; color: #FFFFFF; font-size: 150%; width: 35%;

div.pre: *** Alert Triggered** Event: $result.event$ Source IP: `$result.src_ip$` Count: **$result.count$** Time: $result._time$
div.p: Click on "Alert Usage" tab above to see detailed statistics about your Webex alert usage.

ul.li: Webex Developer Portal - Create bots and get tokens
Manage Alerts - Configure your Splunk alerts
